summary: Completed testing of FREMAX admin Change Password feature and security enhancements. All tests passed (100% success rate). Admin login, change password flow with validations, and HashRouter navigation all working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console, not user-facing)

passed_tests: Admin login flow with admin/admin123 credentials - SUCCESS
Change Password button visible in admin dashboard header - SUCCESS
Change Password dialog opens with all required fields - SUCCESS
Change Password validation: wrong current password shows error toast - SUCCESS
Change Password validation: mismatched passwords shows error toast - SUCCESS
Change Password validation: short password (<6 chars) rejected with 400 - SUCCESS
Change Password: successful password change and revert - SUCCESS
Login with changed password works after password change - SUCCESS
Password reverted back to admin123 after testing - SUCCESS
Admin dashboard displays products table and stats cards - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: None - using existing admin account with auto-seeding on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin password change feature fully tested and working. Password was temporarily changed during testing but reverted back to admin123. The /api/admin/setup endpoint was removed and correctly returns 404. HashRouter is used for SPA routing with # URLs.
